nodes.label: Next.js Breaking Changes Notice
nodes.rationale: The project's Next.js version has breaking API/convention/file-structure changes relative to standard Next.js training data, so agents must consult the local docs in node_modules/next/dist/docs before writing code, to avoid using deprecated or incorrect APIs.

nodes.label: Admin Role Restriction Policy
nodes.rationale: Admins can only create/promote 'user' role accounts via the UI; granting 'admin' is blocked in createStaffMember/updateStaffMember intentionally and must be done directly in the Supabase staff table, to prevent privilege escalation through the app UI. The UI only ever offers demoting admin to user, never the reverse.

nodes.label: No Self-Service Signup Policy
nodes.rationale: There is no self-service signup or email/invite flow; admins create every account directly from /admin/users, keeping account creation fully centralized and controlled.

nodes.label: Server Actions {data, error} Return Shape Convention
nodes.norm_label: server actions {data, error} return shape convention
